title: COVID NTC Protocol
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs the transfer of nuclease-free water into multiple 2 mL tubes. --- * [P300 single-channel GEN2 electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Aluminum Blocks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set?_ga=2.44012454.2010707504.1610321113-1181961818.1604785212) ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs the transfer of nuclease-free water into multiple 2 mL tubes. --- * [P300 single-channel GEN2 electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Aluminum Blocks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set?_ga=2.44012454.2010707504.1610321113-1181961818.1604785212) ---
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
